name: Philly 50th Anniversary Double Chocolate Layer Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 squares Baker's semi-sweet chocolate, melted, slightly
1 ready to use chocolate flavor crumb crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla with a mixer on medium speed until blended.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition until fully incorporated.
3. Stir in the melted chocolate into 1 cup of the batter.
4. Pour the chocolate batter into the prepared crust.
5. Spread the remaining batter evenly over the top.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes or until the center is almost set.
7. Allow to cool completely before refrigerating for 3 hours or overnight.
